build.error:
Exit code 1
warn: CPU lacks AVX support, strange crashes may occur. Reinstall Bun or use *-baseline build:
  https://github.com/oven-sh/bun/releases/download/bun-v1.3.11/bun-darwin-x64-baseline.zip

observation: Build stage failed with exit code 1 after successful taskify and plan completion. The failure stems from a Bun binary compatibility issue—the warning indicates the CPU lacks AVX support and recommends using the baseline build variant. Additionally, taskify identified a scope ambiguity (task specifies src/lib/utils.ts but project convention uses src/utils/) that was flagged but not resolved before the build attempt.
suggestion: Add a pre-build environment validation step that detects CPU AVX support and automatically switches to the Bun baseline binary if needed, preventing silent failures and cryptic warnings during the build stage.

pipelineFlaw.issue: Build fails when Bun binary doesn't match CPU architecture, but this incompatibility is not detected until the build stage attempts to run. No fallback mechanism or early validation exists.
pipelineFlaw.evidence: Build stage exit code 1 paired with warning 'CPU lacks AVX support, strange crashes may occur' and explicit suggestion to reinstall baseline variant. This indicates environment mismatch was undetected during earlier pipeline stages.

build.error:
Exit code 1
warn: CPU lacks AVX support, strange crashes may occur. Reinstall Bun or use *-baseline build:
  https://github.com/oven-sh/bun/releases/download/bun-v1.3.11/bun-darwin-x64-baseline.zip

observation: Build stage failed with exit code 1 due to Bun binary CPU architecture incompatibility (missing AVX support). Taskify and plan stages completed successfully, indicating the task definition and planning were correct. However, the build environment lacks required CPU instruction set for the default Bun binary. Critically, this is the second consecutive failure with identical symptoms (previous run 260327-152817 failed 10 minutes earlier), indicating a persistent environmental configuration issue rather than a task-specific problem.
patternMatch: Repeating pattern: identical Bun AVX support failure as run 260327-152817. Pipeline detects this incompatibility only during build stage execution, not earlier. This is now a known, persistent environmental flaw causing consecutive pipeline failures.
suggestion: Implement immediate CPU architecture detection in build environment setup (before Bun executes). Automatically download and use Bun baseline binary (bun-darwin-x64-baseline) when AVX support is not detected. This prevents repeated failures without requiring manual workarounds.

pipelineFlaw.component: build environment setup / baseline binary selection
pipelineFlaw.issue: Bun binary CPU architecture incompatibility (AVX required) detected only when build stage executes, with no pre-flight validation or automatic fallback mechanism. Environment configuration prevents default Bun binary from running.
pipelineFlaw.evidence: Build stage exits code 1 with warning 'CPU lacks AVX support'; identical failure in previous run 260327-152817; no CPU validation occurs before build execution; warning suggests baseline binary as solution but manual intervention required
